pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure if the project is built with JDK 21 but configured for 17, or vice-versa; ensures correct language level.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set Maven compiler source and target to 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target, Maven might default to an older version or inherit incorrectly, causing runtime NoSuchMethodError or compile errors on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo version to 0.8.12 to support Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: JaCoCo 0.8.11 does not support Java 21 classes, leading to runtime errors during code coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add H2 database dependency for testing purposes.
Add Spring WebFlux starter for testing, likely for WebClient integration tests.
Add JVM arguments to open internal modules for ByteBuddy/Mockito reflection on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito/ByteBuddy fails at runtime with InaccessibleObjectException on JDK 21 without these --add-opens flags.
